first_feedback_entries.quickstart_outcome: success — the quickstart path appears usable but needs external validation
first_feedback_entries.sdk_outcome: success — the SDK shape is minimal and readable; imports without network side effects
first_feedback_entries.integration_example_outcome: success — the LangGraph/LangChain example is intentionally dependency-free and runs in dry-run mode without errors
confusing_points: The quickstart uses port 8765 while the integration example mentions port 8000; this inconsistency could confuse new developers.
The distinction between legacy admin-token mode and operator-model mode is documented but may need a decision tree.
security_readiness_concerns: The public GitHub readiness pack (GL-149) still requires human approval before any actual publication.
Demo tokens are clearly placeholders, but a new developer might accidentally reuse them.
No automated secret-scan is documented as a CI step.
suggested_improvements: Align port references across GL-146 and GL-148 documentation.
Add a one-line decision tree for auth mode selection.
Document how to run git-secrets or truffleHog before any public push.
Add a 'first 60 seconds' summary at the top of the quickstart.
first_feedback_entries.go_no_go_sentiment: Go with caveats — the developer entry path is coherent and the artifacts are present, but external validation is required before claiming readiness for public developer trials.
follow_up_issue_suggestions: GL-151 Public README / Repo Metadata Polish

follow_up_actions: External developer trial with real evaluator

go_no_go_criteria.go: All developer entry path artifacts present and validated; all validation gates pass; feedback intake template exists and exercised; no overclaims present; external validation still required
go_no_go_criteria.no_go: Any validation gate fails; any release blocker unresolved; any secret or real customer data found; any production SaaS or tenant-isolation overclaim present
constraints: Ready for public GitHub publication: No

next_recommended_issue: GL-151 Public README / Repo Metadata Polish
